---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new platform, output format, or capability
title: "[Feature] <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. Who benefits? What workflow does this unlock?

> Example: "I archive Xiaohongshu posts daily and want videoextract to handle them so my pipeline is single-tool."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be specific about the user-facing behavior.

- New CLI flag? `--<name>` does what?
- New platform? Which URL patterns? Which fields populated?
- New output format? What does the file look like?

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Scope

- [ ] Small (single function or new flag)
- [ ] Medium (new module, e.g. one extractor or processor)
- [ ] Large (architectural change)

## Are you willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to send a PR
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] I'm only reporting the idea

## Additional Context

Links to API docs, sample URLs, related projects, screenshots, prior art.
